title: podman port fix output
body:
list a portion of the container id and the ports exposed on the same
line. when using all, if no ports are exposed, do not list the container
id.  Also, shorten the container id to a len of 12 like other container
commands.

Fixes bugzilla #1683734
Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
LGTM, but it looks like you have some test adjustments that need to be made.
One thought, but I'm not committed to seeing it fixed here.
I like @mheon's `--no-trunc` thought, but this LGTM as is.

The no-trunc suggestion should be a different PR,
/lgtm
